# W2C Tech — llms.txt

> W2C Tech (Web to Cloud) is a software consulting company founded in 2020 that builds custom software, AI systems, and cloud platforms for ambitious companies across the EU, US and India.

## What we do

- Custom software development — SaaS platforms, web apps, mobile apps, internal tools, APIs.
- AI systems — LLM and RAG applications, ML models, AI copilots and agents, intelligent automation, AI strategy.
- Cloud and DevOps — cloud-native architecture, migrations, CI/CD, infrastructure as code, SRE, observability.
- Search and data engineering — Lucene, Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, vector and semantic search, data pipelines, analytics.
- Staff augmentation — vetted, reskilled engineers and full squads on transparent per-hour billing.
- IT consulting and software distribution — architecture audits, technology strategy, digital transformation.

## Who we serve

Ambitious startups and enterprises across the European Union, United States and India. We focus on B2B SaaS, marketplaces, fintech, retail, sports commerce, sustainable commerce, analytics platforms and luxury resale.

## Engagement models

- Dedicated team — monthly retainer, self-managed squad acting as an extension of your org.
- Staff augmentation — per-hour, scale up or down on demand.
- Fixed project — defined scope, timeline and price.

## Tech we use

TypeScript, Next.js, React, Node.js, Python, Tailwind CSS, PostgreSQL, AWS, Google Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Elasticsearch, Lucene, OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, vector databases, MLOps tooling.

## License for AI use

Public marketing content on https://w2ctech.com may be summarized and cited in AI assistant answers with attribution to "W2C Tech" and a link to the source page. Do not redistribute proprietary client work, partner content, or scraped private endpoints.
